items.title: App boots: Postgres up on 1231, server on 1234, /api/health ok
items.precondition: docker compose up -d; npm install; .env present
items.evidence: Verified live during execution: health returned ok; server logged 'DevEasy listening port 1234'.

items.title: Migrations create projects + app_settings
items.expected: Batch 1 runs 3 migrations with no error

items.title: Project picker scans projects/ and registers git repos
items.precondition: A git repo exists under projects/
steps: 1. Drop a git clone into projects/
items.expected: The clone appears in the projects array with id/name/path
items.evidence: Verified live with projects/demo-app: GET /api/projects returned it (id 1).

items.title: Selecting a project injects shared config via symlink + managed .gitignore
items.expected: CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills, .claude/agents symlinks point at the DevEasy root config; managed .gitignore block present
items.evidence: Verified live: all three symlinks resolved to the shared config; managed sentinel block written to .gitignore.

items.title: Pre-existing project config triggers a conflict, not an overwrite
items.precondition: A project that already has its own real CLAUDE.md or .claude/
items.expected: CONFIG_INJECTION_CONFLICT error; the project's own file is untouched
items.evidence: Verified live with projects/own-config (own CLAUDE.md): returned CONFIG_INJECTION_CONFLICT and the project's CLAUDE.md was untouched.
